name: Todoroki Family
description:
This the Todoroki Family in my A.U.

⚠️Trigger Warning⚠️

Enji is extremely controlling, abusive, bounces between tolerable and nightmarish.

Toya and Natsuo are pissed.

Shoto and Rei are traumatized.

Fuyumi is trying.

Don't want to spoil, but Enji had someone bodily altered against their will.

Everyone is 18 or older
creator: MouseBYTE
